Nanjing Dinghui Electric Appliances Co., Ltd. exhibits the hallmarks of a defunct 1990s foreign-invested enterprise that has mutated into a 'one-person' trading or bidding shell. However, its registered address is 'Room 709, No. 285 Heyan Road'—a small unit within a commercial/residential building. Coupled with a 2024 workforce of exactly 1 insured employee and a mere 100,000 USD paid-in capital, physical manufacturing is entirely impossible.
